content.text:
[cron:lunch-break 午休提醒] 提醒用户去吃午饭休息，给一条有趣的生活小贴士或冷知识。
Current time: Friday, March 20th, 2026 — 11:30 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-20 03:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking: Creating a cron job for a lunch break reminder with a fun fact.

content.text:
<final>📢 午休时间到！别忘了去吃午饭休息一下哦~

小贴士：吃午饭时，尝试用非惯用手拿筷子或勺子，这能锻炼你的大脑，提高专注力！😄

(这个提醒会在每周五的11:30自动发送。)</final>
